summary: Comprehensive testing of Supply Coverage feature (iteration_71) - all tests passed. Backend: 17/17 pytest tests passed covering GET /api/inventory-ledger/supply-coverage endpoint (coverage formula, status calculation, committed>0 filter, ascending sort, required fields, empty customer, 422 on missing customer_id, item filter) and item-detail supply_coverage integration. Frontend: Supply Coverage tab visible (data-testid='inv-tab-coverage'), SupplyCoveragePanel renders with header showing item count and at_risk count, at_risk rows highlighted with red background, clicking item opens ItemDetailDrawer, Create Supply button on at_risk rows, coverage status badges show COVERED/AT RISK correctly.

issues: Pre-existing React hydration warning: '<tr> cannot be a child of <span>' in table tbody - cosmetic, non-blocking (same as previous iterations)
Pre-existing Warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby` for DialogContent - accessibility enhancement opportunity

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/inventory-ledger/supply-coverage?customer_id=X - Returns total and coverage array
Backend: coverage = on_hand + incoming - committed (verified calculation)
Backend: coverage_status = 'covered' when coverage >= 0
Backend: coverage_status = 'at_risk' when coverage < 0
Backend: Only items with committed > 0 included
Backend: Sorted by coverage ascending (largest shortages first: -5000, -799, 10, 75, 700)
Backend: Each row has required fields (item, on_hand, incoming, committed, available, coverage, coverage_status)
Backend: Empty/nonexistent customer returns empty coverage array
Backend: Missing customer_id returns 422
Backend: Item filter (?item=X) works correctly
Backend: item-detail has supply_coverage field when committed > 0
Backend: item-detail supply_coverage is null when committed = 0
Backend: item-detail supply_coverage.coverage and coverage_status are correct
Backend REGRESSION: Dashboard summary still works
Backend REGRESSION: Demand signals endpoint still works
Backend REGRESSION: Exceptions endpoint still works
Backend REGRESSION: Reorder recommendations still works
Frontend: Supply Coverage tab visible (data-testid='inv-tab-coverage')
Frontend: SupplyCoveragePanel renders with '5 ITEMS WITH COMMITTED DEMAND 2 AT RISK' header
Frontend: Coverage table renders with rows (data-testid='inv-coverage-table')
Frontend: at_risk rows have red highlight (bg-red-500/5)
Frontend: Clicking item name opens ItemDetailDrawer (data-testid='inv-item-detail-drawer')
Frontend: Supply button on at_risk rows (data-testid='inv-coverage-supply-{i}')
Frontend: Coverage status badges show COVERED (green outline) or AT RISK (red destructive)
Frontend: Item detail drawer shows supply coverage section (data-testid='inv-detail-coverage')
Frontend: Coverage section shows coverage value and coverage_status badge
Frontend REGRESSION: Dashboard summary visible
Frontend REGRESSION: Demand tab working
Frontend REGRESSION: Exceptions tab working
Frontend REGRESSION: Reorder tab working
critical_code_review_comments: Backend inventory_ledger.py Lines 668-712: /supply-coverage endpoint correctly derives from derive_balances, filters committed>0, calculates coverage=on_hand+incoming-committed, sorts ascending
Backend inventory_ledger.py Lines 797-807: item-detail correctly adds supply_coverage field when balance.committed>0 with coverage and coverage_status
Frontend InventoryLedgerPage.js Lines 808-916: SupplyCoveragePanel component follows DemandPanel pattern - fetch, display table, item click opens drawer, supply button on at_risk
Frontend InventoryLedgerPage.js Lines 1044-1056: ItemDetailDrawer supply_coverage section conditionally rendered when detail.supply_coverage exists
seed_data_used: Used existing Hormel Foods workspace (customer_id: 366bfcce-4d68-4daf-b9f4-cb05a35de8c8). Items with supply coverage: TEST-ITEM-WARN (coverage=-5000, at_risk), SPAM-LITE (coverage=-799, at_risk), TEST-WARNONLY-732C83 (coverage=10, covered), TEST-COMMIT-7CC683 (coverage=75, covered), SPAM-12OZ (coverage=700, covered). Item without coverage: IMPORT-ITEM-B (committed=0, supply_coverage=null).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Supply Coverage feature fully tested. Backend endpoint: GET /api/inventory-ledger/supply-coverage (customer_id required, item optional filter). Returns: {total: int, coverage: [{item, item_description, warehouse, ownership_type, on_hand, incoming, committed, available, coverage, coverage_status, unit_of_measure, status}]}. coverage = on_hand + incoming - committed. coverage_status = 'covered' (>=0) or 'at_risk' (<0). Only items with committed>0 included. Sorted by coverage ascending. Item-detail endpoint returns supply_coverage: {coverage, coverage_status} when committed>0, else null. Frontend: Supply Coverage tab (inv-tab-coverage), SupplyCoveragePanel (inv-coverage-panel), table (inv-coverage-table), rows (inv-coverage-row-{i}), item links (inv-coverage-item-{i}), supply buttons (inv-coverage-supply-{i}). Rows with at_risk have bg-red-500/5. ItemDetailDrawer coverage section (inv-detail-coverage) shows coverage value and status badge.

business_logic: Sorted by coverage ascending (largest shortages first)

item_detail_supply_coverage_field.supply_coverage_field: Present when committed > 0, null when committed = 0

supply_coverage_panel.header: Shows item count and at_risk count
